summary: A maximum-fidelity reconstruction of the lost 'Clarifying Wincham Tax Misrepresentations' conversation (ID: 1c5a471b-643f-4060-b67a-51fbec736b59, 5 April 2026, 18:56–19:17 UTC). The conversation directory is empty (no raw log). This artifact reconstructs the session from: conversation metadata and objective, surviving workspace artifacts (Wincham_Professional_Negligence_Strategy.md, pre_action_protocol_letter.md, the HTML versions), cross-session timeline positioning, and the legal substance of what was in scope. Covers the four discussion threads (ITP vs Modelo 210 distinction, Ellis Briefing review, Pre-Action Protocol letter review, HTML/PDF conversion), all documents discussed or produced, and key legal conclusions reached.
